rows.Karamja Diary: Travel to Port Sarim via the dock, east of Musa Point. Travel to Ardougne via the port near Brimhaven.
Charter the Lady of the Waves from south of Cairn Isle to Port Khazard. Use the gnome glider to travel to Karamja. Charter a ship from the shipyard in the far east of Karamja.
Eat an oomlie wrap. Kill a deathwing in the dungeon under the Kharazi Jungle. Collect 5 palm leaves.
Create an antivenom potion whilst standing in the horse shoe mine.

Vorkath (Note that the Fremennik Provinces alone do not provide the means to create anti-venoms.)[c]

^ Extra arder-musca poisons and their materials will not be cleared from the inventory after killing the Duke, so poisons can be made in batches and kept in the inventory between kills. However, the contents of the fermentation vats will reset to empty when the Duke wakes up or if the player leaves.
^ Players may create private instances to fight the Dagannoth Kings.
^ Cure Me is available as an alternative, which will downgrade venom to poison and cure poison.
Blast Furnace, operated by Dwarves Ice gloves will be placed in your bank upon region unlock and can be reclaimed from The Sage if lost
